summary: Made a minimal exit-seam polish so the chapter hands off more cleanly into chapter 11's silent return to the Bebop, while preserving all beats, dialogue, and tonal pressure.
edits: Specified that the crew's quiet walk is back to the Bebop to tighten the chapter-to-chapter handoff.
Adjusted Faye's final chip detail so its physical pressure carries directly into the next chapter's opening image.
